name: Mini India
content: Mini India is a grocery store with a small take-out restaurant in the back. The food is great, and the spice level would likely melt the taste buds of most Irish folks. Unfortunately, I am from California. Oftentimes, I was the only white person in the establishment. The food was great and the staff was friendly, if a little amused at the white boy’s spice tolerance. Their food single handedly maintained my spice tolerance while I lived in Ireland. They are conveniently located near the Limerick-Dublin 300 bus station. I get dinner there whenever I pass through Dublin.
